ptxt.intxrefpoff: Flywheel / Drive Plate Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: If ring gear is damaged, cracked or worn, replace flywheel (M/T model) or drive plate (A/T model).
If the surface contacting clutch disc is damaged or excessively worn, replace flywheel (M/T model) or drive plate (A/T model).

servinfosub.title: Flywheel / Drive Plate Face Runout
servinfosub.ptxt: Check flywheel (M/T model) or drive plate (A/T model) face runout with a dial gauge.
If runout exceeds its limit, replace flywheel or drive plate.
